C. COLLEGE OF MEXICO; Edo. de Chiapas 43599 WILLIAM & MARY Liquidambar styraciflua L. Large stand of mostly saplings; with Pinus, Quercus, Alnus, Arbutus, Gaultheria, and Pernettya. 2 km S of TENEJAPA, on the road between San Cristobal de las Casas and Tenejapa. 16°49'N, 92°32'W Alt.: 2130 m. 21 July 1979 Celeste M. Corcoran No. 1720 with George Diggs & Sue Keller
